formulas.name: Distance Formula
formulas.variables: x1, y1, z1 (first point's coordinates), x2, y2, z2 (second point's coordinates)

formulas.name: Section Formula
formulas.variables: x1, y1, z1 (point's coordinates), x2, y2, z2 (point's coordinates), λ (parameter), a, b, c (direction ratios)

formulas.name: Direction Cosines of a Line
formulas.formula: l = cos α, m = cos β, n = cos γ
formulas.variables: l, m, n (direction cosines), α (angle with x-axis), β (angle with y-axis), γ (angle with z-axis)

formulas.name: Direction Ratios of a Line
formulas.formula: a = l / cos α, b = m / cos β, c = n / cos γ
formulas.variables: a, b, c (direction ratios), l, m, n (direction cosines), α (angle with x-axis), β (angle with y-axis), γ (angle with z-axis)

formulas.name: Equation of a Line in Space
formulas.variables: a, b, c (direction ratios), x1, y1, z1 (point's coordinates)

formulas.name: Equation of a Plane
formulas.variables: a, b, c (coefficients), x, y, z (coordinates), d (constant)

formulas.name: Cartesian Equation of a Sphere
formulas.variables: x, y, z (coordinates), g, f, h (coefficients), d (constant)

formulas.name: Symmetrical Form of a Sphere
formulas.variables: x, y, z (coordinates), h, k, l (center's coordinates), r (radius)
